name: {NICKNAME}
desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.name: Best Seat in the House
1.desc: After using Skill for the first time, immediately recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s).

2.name: Jailbreaking Rainbowwalk
2.desc: When the battle starts, the Trailblazer's Energy Regeneration Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Sanatorium for Rest Notes
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Dove in Tophat
4.desc: While the Trailblazer is on the field, increases the Break Effect of all teammates (excluding the Trailblazer), by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Trailblazer's Break Effect.

5.name: Poem Favors Rhythms of Old
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Tomorrow, Rest in Spotlight
6.desc: The number of additional DMG applications by the Skill increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

800501.name: Swing Dance Etiquette
800501.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy target.
800501.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy.

800502.name: Halftime to Make It Rain
800502.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy target and additionally deals DMG for 4 times, with each time dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to a random enemy.
800502.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to single enemy targets with 5 Bounces in total.

800503.name: <unbreak>All-Out</unbreak> <unbreak>Footlight Parade</unbreak>
800503.desc: Grants all allies the Backup Dancer effect, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Trailblazer's every turn. Allies with the Backup Dancer effect have their Break Effect increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>. And when they attack enemy targets that are in the <u>Weakness Broken state</u>, the Toughness Reduction of the attack will be converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u>.
800503.simple_desc: Grants all allies the Backup Dancer effect. Allies with Backup Dancer have their <color=#f29e38ff>Break Effect increased</color> and additionally deal <color=#f29e38ff><u>Super Break DMG</u></color> 1 time when they attack enemy targets that are <u>Weakness Broken</u>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000015.name: Super Break DMG
10000015.desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

800504.name: Full-on Aerial Dance
800504.desc: The Trailblazer immediately regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]</unbreak></color> Energy when an enemy target's Weakness is Broken.
800504.simple_desc: The Trailblazer regenerates Energy when an enemy target's Weakness is Broken.

800506.name: Attack
800506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800507.name: Now! I'm the Band!
800507.desc: After the Technique is used, at the start of the next battle, all allies' Break Effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
800507.simple_desc: At the start of the next battle, increases all allies' Break Effect.

1.point_desc: When the number of enemy targets on the field is (≥5)/4/3/2/1, the <u>Super Break DMG</u> triggered by the Backup Dancer effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>.

10000015.name: Super Break DMG
10000015.desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

1.point_desc: When using Skill, additionally increases the Toughness Reduction of the first instance of DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
After ally targets break weakness, additionally <u>delays the action</u> of the enemy target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.
